title: [MTR4] 西武新2000系|Seibu New 2000 Series
description: Resource pack that adds eibu New 2000 Series into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The **Seibu New 2000 Series** are trains produced by Tokyu Car Corporation and Seibu Tokorozawa Railway Works between 1988 and 1993. A total of 314 vehicles are produced to replace the older 411 and 701 series. 

This resource pack is to add the Seibu New 2000 Series series into Minecraft with the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2024.

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Seibu Railway Co., Ltd.
